_notes: Canonical list of portal routes. Seeded from window2-portal-sandbox main @ 55682bb on 2026-04-22.
status values: live | quarantined | dead | fake | planned | redirect.
roles: array of role strings from { operator, planner, admin, viewer }.
This file is edited by the tranche-fix author when a route moves status; the regression-sentinel + pr-guard enforce consistency with src/app/.

Tranche 001 (2026-04-22): corrected /ops/stock/* paths to /stock/* (pages live in the (ops) route group, parens stripped); reclassified /admin/integrations, /admin/jobs, /admin/users to quarantined (pages render <QuarantinedPage>); added /inbox and /admin/products/[item_id] rows.

Tranche 016 (2026-04-22): enumerated remaining detail sub-pages (forecast/new, forecast/[version_id], runs/[run_id], items/[item_id] legacy redirect, components/[component_id], suppliers/[supplier_id], boms/[head_id], boms/[head_id]/versions/[version_id], products/new, inbox/approvals/waste/[submission_id], inbox/approvals/physical-count/[submission_id]).

Tranche 045 (2026-06-11): planning consolidation — added status value 'redirect' (URL-preserved permanent redirect stub; _lib/_components siblings may remain imported elsewhere). purchase-session + purchase-calendar now redirect to /planning/procurement; weekly-outlook row added and redirects to /planning/inventory-flow; runs demoted to diagnostic-only.

Tranche 046 (2026-06-11): full manifest regeneration — every src/app/**/page.tsx now has a row (41 → 77). Roles derived from the ACTUAL route-group layout gates + the role×capability lattice (src/lib/auth/authorize.ts): (ops) stock:execute = operator+planner+admin; (planning) and (planner) planning:read = all four roles; (po) and (shared) and (inbox) viewer:read = all four roles; (economics) planning:execute = planner+admin; (admin) admin:execute = admin only. T6 resolution: /admin/users, /admin/jobs, /admin/integrations reclassified quarantined → live. Redirect stubs marked: /admin, /admin/items/[item_id], /dashboard/v2, /stock/submissions, /exceptions (plus the three Tranche 045 planning redirects).
Tranche 086 (2026-06-20): added /purchase-orders/placement-queue (live, planning:execute) — office-manager place-order queue for the two-stage PO handoff (APPROVED_TO_ORDER → OPEN).

Tranche 090 (2026-06-25): added three orphan rows surfaced by the /portal-audit route-auditor — /admin/decision-board (tranche 080, economics group planner+admin), /credit-tracking (CLAUDE.md-authorized bookkeeper surface, shared group all roles), /inbox/approvals/inventory-movement/[submission_id] (planner+admin approval). All three were live code + nav with no manifest row. No status changes; additive only.
